pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + MLP 3.5× + Mixed int5/int6 + Brotli — 1.1125 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fused Triton/CUTLASS MLP kernels, 3.5× hidden dim, and Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 quantization push capacity while Brotli keeps it under 16 MB.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels
MLP width 3.5× with Hessian-ranked mixed int5/int6 quantization
Brotli-11 artifact compression with memmap multi-shard prefetch pipeline
